programme.title: Unique Sweets: European Sweets
programme.desc: Today we're getting a sweet taste of Europe right here in the United States.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Reinvention
programme.desc: In New York City a charming little shop in putting a gourmet spin on a crisp rice treat, with flavours loved by children and adults alike.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Capital Cravings
programme.desc: We visit some of the eateries that satisfy the sweet cravings of Washington, D.C.'s power brokers, including Golden Brown Delicious and Cupcakes Actually.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Paddington
programme.desc: Four bakers battle to have their cake creation at the centre of a party celebrating the 90th birthday of Paddington Bear's creator, Michael Bond. R.W. Alley, the illustrator of Paddington, helps choose who wins $10,000.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Dr. Seuss
programme.desc: Everyone from the Cat in the Hat to Thing 1 and Thing 2 are coming to Cake Wars for a huge Dr. Seuss celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Detroit
programme.desc: With a menu that includes everything from iconic soul food like short ribs and ox tails, to a restaurant serving up lamb brain sandwiches in the heart of Arab America, to a local man known for his longstanding muskrat recipe.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: West Virginia
programme.desc: Andrew travels to West Virginia, where people are using methods both old and new to prepare wildlife that flourishes in the state's mountains and rivers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kanazawa
programme.desc: Andrew introduces Kanazawa, Japan, a modern city filled with deep traditions. From regionally fished Kano crab to sushi built using aged rice and fresh seafood, he explores tantalizing eats that are unspoiled by international tourism.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: NOLA
programme.desc: New Orleans is a vibrant, eclectic city and its cuisine has been fused with a multitude of culinary influences. Andrew Zimmern explores the classic dishes from po' boys and gumbo to oysters Rockefeller and bananas Foster.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Munich
programme.desc: As the proud capital of Bavaria and beer-drinking, Munich has built a cuisine around hearty dishes meant to stick to the bones. From schnitzel and spätzle to knöedel and cake, Andrew Zimmern reveals Munich's festival of foods.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.desc: Learn the explosive history of the rocket, from its origin in ancient China, to its use as a weapon of war, to how adding hydrogen allowed it to carry astronauts all the way to the moon.

programme.title: Nova: Cat Tales
programme.desc: Worshiped as a goddess, condemned as satanic and spun into a stunning array of breeds, cats have long fascinated humans. See if we ever really domesticate them and what science can tell us about our most mysterious companions.

programme.title: Send Me
programme.desc: US Army Ranger and a warrior Matt Eversmann, who was awarded the Bronze Star with Valor, revisits the horrors of war.

programme.title: 1st to Fight: Pacific War Marines
programme.desc: Experiences of the 1st Marine Division on the Pacific island of Guadalcanal in 1942 are documented.

programme.title: The Registry
programme.desc: When the United States military needed help defeating Japan in WWII, they called on second-generation Japanese-Americans (the 'Nisei') from the internment camps to serve in a confidential unit called the Military Intelligence Service.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Catfishing Teacher
programme.desc: A high school student plans a clandestine hookup with his female teacher but ends up in a far more sinister situation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Motherly Love
programme.desc: A teenage boy uses a rifle to stop an assault on his mother, but soon learns the target was someone he knows.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Great Expectations
programme.desc: The SVU investigates the players of a top youth hockey team after a vicious locker room hazing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chasing Demons
programme.desc: A doctor arrested for sexually abusing his patients is set free after Cassidy's testimony causes a mistrial.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: In Loco Parentis
programme.desc: Carisi opens a police investigation when his niece reports a classmate for sexual assault and Stone learns that there are no perfect witnesses when it comes to sex crimes.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: A waitress from a trendy New York restaurant is sexually assaulted at an after-hours VIP party.

programme.title: The Broderick Files: Betty Broderick
programme.desc: A look back at one of the most riveting cases of the 1990s: the Betty Broderick murders.

programme.title: Modern Family: Good Cop Bad Dog
programme.desc: Phil and Claire swap parenting roles for the day. Claire will be the fun-loving good cop and Phil the disciplinarian bad cop. Gloria takes in every sob story and stray she comes across, and Jay gives business advice to an overzealous entrepreneur.

programme.title: Modern Family: See You Next Fall
programme.desc: The whole family is gathering at Jay's before heading out to Alex's graduation ceremony from middle school. Jay is preoccupied, hiding a Botox mishap from everyone, and Cameron is upset about Mitchell's habit of laughing at his expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: The family vacations at a dude ranch in Wyoming where Jay squares off against a surprising foe. Mitch and Cam want to share news about their pending adoption plans, but suddenly realize that Lily may not be as ready as they are.

programme.title: Modern Family: When Good Kids Go Bad
programme.desc: Lily strongly disagrees with Mitchell and Cameron when they announce their plan to adopt another child. Manny is suspected of stealing a locket from school, and Jay tries to get him to confess. Claire goes to the extremes to prove she is right.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Biddy Battle
programme.desc: Todd finds himself in the middle of an old biddy battle when Frances moves in with Faye while Grayson attempts to break a world record.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Painted Into a Corner
programme.desc: Todd stresses out Julie when he insists on investing in an oil painting of the family. After a kitchen fire, Grayson decides the Chrisleys need some emergency response training.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pure
programme.desc: A teenage girl disappears and a psychic holds the clues to the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Blinded
programme.desc: When Olivia and Elliot discover a kidnapped girl in the trunk of a stolen rental car, they are led to her violent, schizophrenic abductor. The case forces Casey to face the reality of her own dark past.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Spooked
programme.desc: When the detectives investigate the murder of a young couple, the FBI intervenes, believing the case is too dangerous for the SVU cops.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Possessed
programme.desc: The detectives try to find a Brooklyn DA, who is in danger, but do not make it in time. After learning that the crime scene was tampered with, Benson turns to an old friend for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light
programme.desc: When Chicago's 'Nightcrawler' Bobby Trent is murdered over a single piece of footage, Intelligence must investigate one of Chicago's wealthiest families, uncovering a lineage of old money and secrets.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Grasping for Salvation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a teenage boy, Voight finds a connection to an old case. The victim's father, a prominent defense attorney, tries to get the case taken over by Area Central Homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin
programme.desc: The team is called to an in-progress bank robbery and find a detective trying to take over the crime scene. As the robberies continue to be executed around the city, Lindsay is forced to make a decision in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Army of One
programme.desc: A live video is streamed online showcasing a tortured man being beaten and burned alive. Upon further investigation, the victim's identity is traced back to that of a man who had been locked up for statutory rape.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fork in the Road
programme.desc: When Lindsay receives a panicked phone call from her mother, Bunny, whose boyfriend has just been shot, Lindsay must figure out the best way to approach the situation as her mother is now the main suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Reform
programme.desc: The district is in a state of change, Lindsay has moved to New York and the CPD is under scrutiny about the corrupt nature of its institution. The team attempts to bust a gun deal that quickly turns dicey when innocent people get involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Thing About Heroes
programme.desc: After a van explodes during a Chicago street festival, Muslim patrol officer Frank Toma goes missing and evidence piles up pointing to his involvement, but Burgess is desperate to prove his innocence.

programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, a matchmaker is tasked by her mentor to find a match for an entrepreneur who believes staying single is the key to success.

programme.desc: Martha fills in as the local Dear Debbie advice columnist, getting an anonymous letter that adds intrigue during a progressive dinner attended by all of our Middleton couples.

programme.title: Movie: Sun, Sand and Romance

programme.title: Movie: Love in the Sun
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman returns to her hometown where she finds herself falling for another man. She now must decide if she wants to be with her current fiancée, or, if she wants to explore life with her new beau.

programme.title: Movie: Sailing Into Love
programme.desc: Biology teacher Claire is a bridesmaid and conducts a class on Blue Island. Claire takes action when she learns her former boyfriend works for the developer building a resort on Blue Island.

programme.title: Movie: All Summer Long

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Countdown to XL: Only in Brazil

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Countdown to XL: Under the Brazilian Sun
programme.desc: Two survivalists who took on sun-scorched Brazil, encountering deadly anacondas and venomous stingrays along the way, reflect on their adventure. Their trials have helped prepare them for the upcoming 40-day XL challenge in Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Countdown to XL: Back to the Jungle
programme.desc: Former survivalists reflect on their journey into the Mexican jungle, where they dealt with torrential downpours and a machete accident. The survivalists now prepare for their upcoming 40-day XL challenge in Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Valley of the Banished
programme.desc: Survivalists enter a punishing African location where tribes in the area lived by a simple principle: banish the weak. As the 40-day challenge begins, deadly crocodiles and territorial leopards circle. A survivalist is quickly targeted for banishment.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Nicaragua Nightmare
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to survive for 21 days in the hot and swampy jungles of southern Nicaragua armed with only a machete and a roll of duct tape. But an early tap out leaves one of them left to survive alone for 16 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Valley of the Banished
programme.desc: Survivalists enter a punishing African location where tribes in the area lived by a simple principle: banish the weak. As the 40-day challenge begins, deadly crocodiles and territorial leopards circle. A survivalist is quickly targeted for banishment.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Garden of Evil

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: They Call Me Bad Chad

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: You Use What You Got
programme.desc: Looking to expand his business, Chad takes on a commission to build a custom 1930s style delivery truck, starting from a discarded 1934 Desoto Airflow coupe.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Spinning Ain't Winning
programme.desc: Chucky and his infamous team from Detroit toe the line against Richard McCarver and his Mississippi racers. Chucky's ready to prove Motor City's dominance, but McCarver knows a big mouth doesn't mean you're a big deal.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Move Over, Motor City
programme.desc: The final match rages on between the racers from Mississippi and the big-mouth, bigger-horsepower team from Detroit. The Motor City boys think the win is in the bag, but a surprise comeback from Richard McCarver keeps the South in the game.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Final Four
programme.desc: Only four teams have survived to the second round of the biggest street race in history. Street-smart Chris Rankin and his Northeast crew go head-to-head against upstart Kye Kelley and his New Orleans' crew.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Takedown
programme.desc: In the second round, Chris Rankin and the Northeast face off against Kye Kelley and his New Orleans' crew. The North won't be counted out yet, but they'll need to dig deep to outrun and outgun the South.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Big, Bad Block
programme.desc: The second match of round two pits Chucky and his team from Detroit against Chris Block and his South Carolina racers. Tensions have been mounting since the duo's scuffle at the last chip draw, and the $100,000 pot is fanning the flames.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Too Much Power
programme.desc: The fast-paced feud between Detroit and South Carolina continues and Motor City brings more power than their cars can handle. Block's team tries to take advantage of Detroit's mistake, and the race comes down to the wire.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: NOLA vs. Detroit: Battle of the Heavyweights

programme.title: Street Outlaws: NOLA vs. Detroit: Dominate or Go Home Part 2

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis vs. NOLA: 100 Grand Stand
programme.desc: Memphis vs. NOLA: The final matchup is on, with $100,000 at stake. Kye Kelley's NOLA team is riding high after defeating Detroit, but JJ and the MSO won't be intimidated. Both teams are tested to their limits when they face off outside of Las Vegas.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis vs. NOLA: Winner Takes All

programme.title: Listing Impossible: The Cold Box on the Beach

programme.title: Listing Impossible: The Best Castle n Orange County

programme.title: Listing Impossible: The House on the 16th Hole

programme.title: Listing Impossible: The Flashing Neon Party Pad

programme.title: Listing Impossible: The Finest English Manor in Napa

programme.title: Listing Impossible: The Marble Monument to Love

programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: What Matters Most
programme.desc: Mary attempts to diversify into other types of tird products, and is invited to present as part of Career Day at Katie's high school.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Big Craft Show
programme.desc: Mary, Deb, Tammi, Dale and the rest of the Tirdy Works team heads to a craft show in New Hampshire in search of a market hungry for her art.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: Man's Best Friends

programme.desc: Matthew and Abbi show us how to get inked. They take us through the history of tattoos, demonstrate how to minimize pain, and give a full briefing on laser tattoo removal. Plus, Abbi surprises friends and family with temporary tats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Charity Case

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Theater del Absurdo
programme.desc: The guys raise money for absurd charities at a donut shop, join diners mid-meal in a Chinese restaurant, and offer unsolicited advice to shoppers in a mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: The guys mouth off to patients in a dentist's office, toss popcorn at movie goers in a theatre, and take photos for their outrageous blogs in a public park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Strip High Five
programme.desc: The guys say all the wrong things when conducting sensitivity training, have unexpected celebrity sightings on the street, and are forced into being unreceptive receptionists in a busy office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: The guys search for imaginary places with a little help from strangers, pick their own poison in the park, and there's a surprise behind every door in the horrifying hunt for a house sitter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Love Expert
programme.desc: The guys lose their rhythm while teaching dance class and try to hock tickets to Broadway.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: The jokers make some tough calls at a telemarketing agency that leaves everyone wondering if they're just phoning it in. Then, the guys' intentions get wishy-washy at a fountain in the mall. Plus, Q and Sal tap into their spiritual side down at the shore.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blind Justice
programme.desc: The guys get a little punchy while giving boxing lessons, then head to the mall to share the gift of music with strangers. When tonight’s loser delivers the right speech to the wrong audience, he’s the one who gets scared straight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: HellCopter
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as unreceptive receptionists in an office waiting room, then head to a wax museum where they mingle with the stiff crowd. And in tonight’s double punishment, two losers are taken on a chopper ride from hell.

programme.desc: A relationship heats up between Carrie and Petrovsky; Samantha encounters her ex.

programme.desc: Steve and Miranda decide to get married; Samantha discovers a lump in her breast.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Catch-38
programme.desc: Samantha tries to get a doctor's appointment; Miranda and Steve go on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Out of the Frying Pan
programme.desc: Samantha deals with losing her hair; Miranda moves to Brooklyn; Charlotte gets a dog.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Cold War
programme.desc: Samantha circulates a steamy video to stop rumours; Charlotte enters her dog in a show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Splat!
programme.desc: Petrovsky makes an announcement at the tension-filled dinner party he throws for Carrie.

programme.title: Sex and the City: An American Girl in Paris (Part Une)
programme.desc: Carrie grows lonely in Paris, while Big sets out to bring her back into his life.

programme.title: Sex and the City: An American Girl in Paris (Part Deux)
programme.desc: Carrie encounters Big after a falling-out with Petrovsky; Steve's mother has a stroke.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City
programme.desc: A couple's plan to have a small wedding gets blown way out of proportion when the bride is asked to model wedding dresses for Vogue magazine. The groom's cold feet result in the bridal party going off to Mexico without him.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City
programme.desc: A couple's plan to have a small wedding gets blown way out of proportion when the bride is asked to model wedding dresses for Vogue magazine. The groom's cold feet result in the bridal party going off to Mexico without him.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Whatever Happened to Seymour Magoon?
programme.desc: Jillian sprains her ankle and convinces Ed to present their family dog at the Nevada State Dog Show. Monica buys an 80-year-old woman's house to build a golf course but things get complicated when a demolition crew uncovers a skeleton.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Big Ed De-Cline
programme.desc: Ed is told to relax but he soon finds out that he has become the victim of identity theft.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Real Mccoy
programme.desc: Danny tracks down the identity of the mystery woman who appears in photos with his father and, despite warnings from Mike and Mary, he offers to give her money for an outstanding medical expense. Later, Danny becomes suspicious of his new flame, Penny.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Everything Old Is You Again
programme.desc: When Danny visits an antique fair at the Montecito he becomes the focus of a flash back to the Jubilee Hotel and Casino circa 1962 where he is the director of entertainment.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bold, Beautiful and Blue
programme.desc: Danny, Monica and FBI Agent Portis review the security measures taken to protect the Kashmir Sapphire, a priceless gemstone on loan and display at the Montecito, from theft. Meanwhile, Monica tries to lure Ed back to the Montecito with lavish gifts.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Mothwoman
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts a comic book convention and Monica questions Danny's decision to have it at the hotel, after she's mistaken for Mothwoman by the comic book fans. Meanwhile, Sam runs into an old nemesis at a funeral and sparks fly.

programme.title: Las Vegas: For Sail by Owner
programme.desc: A hostile takeover of the Montecito casino is thwarted by a stunning change of events. Mike is mugged by a thug, leaving Danny to seek revenge. Meanwhile, Delinda is smitten by a blind man who keeps his real life a secret from her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Down and Dirty
programme.desc: When a televised national poker tour comes to the Montecito, Danny and Mike investigate their hunch that someone is cheating. Elsewhere, Sam battles with Casey over their divorce settlement, and demands half ownership of the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: When diamonds are stolen from the Montecito pool taping of a Fat Joe music video, Danny and Ed rely on amateur sex video footage to track down the thief. Elsewhere, Sam and Mary set out to reveal Mike's secret as a male stripper named Hot Chocolate.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Bitch Is Back
programme.desc: The Montecito prepares for the opening of Wolfgang Puck's seventh Vegas restaurant. Elsewhere, hotel guests become frightened when they begin to have ghostly encounters. Sam wagers a bet with her nemesis to see who is the best host in Vegas.

programme.title: Las Vegas: And Here's Mike With the Weather
programme.desc: Ed and Danny try to track down $2.9 million worth of irregularities in the Montecito's books. Meanwhile, Danny's former marine sergeant visits and Danny offers him a job at the casino. Elsewhere, Mike gets to fulfill his dream of reporting the weather.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Urban Legends
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts a car show and NASCAR driver Jimmie Johnson comes to Las Vegas to act as a celebrity judge. Meanwhile, an urban legend comes to life when Danny and Mike discover a man with a missing kidney lying in a bathtub full of ice.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: When Monica's friend Norma finds a finger in the Montecito's new buffet, everyone braces for a lawsuit. However, Norma tells Ed she only wants one thing: Danny. Meanwhile, Sam has a difficult time dealing with a tough customer.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Lyle and Substance
programme.desc: A thief complicates matters when he claims that he met someone who plans to blow up the Montecito. Ed sees this as the thief's ploy to get out of trouble but Danny feels it is necessary to investigate. Meanwhile, Sam hears rumours about the new masseur.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Like a Virgin
programme.desc: Mary finds herself coordinating an extravagant wedding for one of Sam's whales. Meanwhile, Ed and Danny are up against card counters of very unusual sorts, and Mike chases a woman who, unbeknownst to him, is attending a Born Again Virgin conference.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All-American All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy cruises the country for all-stars, from burgers to dogs to cafes and neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy fires up big tie barbecue all over the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Summer Spectacular
programme.desc: Fire up the grills and get the party started, Guy Fieri's bringin' the heat! In this one-hour special, it's all about summer.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: A Day at the Races

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Sea-List to A-List
programme.desc: The recruits enter boot camp to see that it has been transformed into a nautical oasis, equipped with fish tanks and a live mermaid! For their skill drill challenge, the recruits dive into the world of seafood by solving a recipe riddle to make ceviche.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Officer Fluette and Moxie attend their graduation. Officer Holmes and trainee McDermott investigate a possible illegal bait site and run a decoy operation with Officer Egan. Sergeant Lucas checks on a moose with odd behavior.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Poachers Beware
programme.desc: A deer poacher is busted, a baby rattlesnake is rescued, a hummingbird evades capture, and a raccoon is released into the wild. The game wardens also respond to flooding conditions and a car accident.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Conserving the state's animals is a Texas Game Warden's job. From an injured deer in the north of the state to illegal fish and crabs along the Gulf coast to migratory doves in Central Texas, the Game Wardens protect their state's resources.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Ram on the Road
programme.desc: Game Wardens Mike Boone and Jake Noxon rush to try to save a bald eagle. Jennifer Provaznik and Mack Chambers patrol the coastline in search of fishing violations. While out on patrol, Warden Kegan Gould spots a ram walking on the side of the highway.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Best: Submerged
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are all hands on deck after a massive flash flood. Game Wardens rush to a gas station that could explode. A patrol through the Rio Grande leads to an unexpected encounter. Game Wardens investigate an illegally killed hawk.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Moving Target
programme.desc: Game Wardens beef up patrols for the short pronghorn season. A deer needs to be captured and relocated from an industrial site, and an injured hawk is rushed to a rehabber. Near Port Aransas, Game Wardens check duck hunters on the bay.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hit the Ground Hunting
programme.desc: Heimo stalks his best hunting grounds and Tyler tracks caribou as the pressure is on to get a big kill before the harsh Alaskan winter takes hold. Charlie inspects his traplines but damage from summer wildfires puts his season in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Price of Freedom
programme.desc: Heimo's daughter Krin and family arrive in the refuge, but their cabin is uninhabitable.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Two Kills
programme.desc: Needing a big kill to sustain them through the winter, Heimo takes Krin and Scott to his best caribou hunting grounds. Tyler and Ashley want running water in their cabin.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Regrets
programme.desc: The loss of Bob Harte is felt across the Refuge. Heimo boats to Bob's cabin to bring Bob's possessions to his family. Charlie recovers his father's shotgun from a hidden survival cache and hunts small game. Edna prepares her favorite meal, caribou head.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunter Is Hunted
programme.desc: As moose season opens, the hunt is on to get meat to sustain them through winter. As Charlie looks for a kill, he realizes he's being stalked by a bear. Heimo takes Krin to his best moose territory. Tyler takes to the skies to assess the fire damage.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: Tyler needs to hunt a moose to feed in family. Heimo and Scott race to get the boat off the freezing water. Bob's daughter and ex-wife return to his cab to honor his memory.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hard Choices
programme.desc: Heimo is desperate to get a moose for winter. Charlie and Tyler have to overcome fire damage on their traplines.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Never Gets Easier
programme.desc: With no meat for winter, Heimo's desperate to run his trapline, but has no choice but to hunt for moose. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Biting Back
programme.desc: Heimo tests his trapping skills on both land and water to outsmart one of his favorite catches, beaver. Scott puts lessons learned to the test as he tracks marten. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Laying Down Their Legacy
programme.desc: Scrambling to finish trapping season, Heimo discovers the best catch of the season: a wolf. Charlie walks a legend's footsteps as he works the traplines Bob left to him. Tyler takes on the challenge of getting their hunting cabin ready for next season.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: The Kilchers are on the hunt for more meat after being caught in a particularly nasty winter. While the hunt is necessary, it is fraught with peril as they navigate the frozen wilderness.

programme.desc: Harley has her final showdown with the Joker.

programme.title: Futurama: Fear of a Bot Planet
programme.desc: Bender is offended by the slavery of robots, but the Planet Express staff members think he's overreacting.

programme.title: Futurama: A Fishful of Dollars
programme.desc: Fry discovers he's a billionaire because his savings have been gaining interest. He gets nostalgic about all things from the 20th century.

programme.title: Futurama: My Three Suns
programme.desc: Fry becomes the emperor of a planet inhabited by liquid aliens after he drinks the ruler. It soon becomes apparent that assassination is the fate of all emperors, and things get even worse when the emperor turns out to be alive in Fry's stomach.

programme.title: Futurama: A Big Piece of Garbage
programme.desc: When Fry uses the Professor's Smell-o-scope, he discovers a giant ball of garbage flying toward New New York City.

programme.title: Futurama: Hell Is Other Robots
programme.desc: Bender gets addicted to power surges until he finds salvation at the Temple of Robotology, but it may already be too late as the musical Robot Devil has his eyes set on Bender.

programme.title: Movie: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-con receives a call from his estranged daughter asking for help. She has become the target of a deadly group of Mexican drug dealers. Returning to a life he thought he left behind, he uses his old skills and contacts to keep his daughter safe.

programme.title: Vagrant Queen: No Clue
programme.desc: Adrift in space, the team find themselves in the middle of a very strange murder mystery.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Thirty Fathom Grave
programme.desc: A U.S. Navy destroyer picks up strange sounds coming from a sunken submarine ship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mute
programme.desc: A child, who is only able to communicate telepathically, is taken in by the town sheriff.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One for the Angels
programme.desc: A man refuses to go with a grim reaper, which only causes death to prey on someone else.

programme.title: Movie: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
programme.desc: Newt Scamander reaches New York at the end of his journey researching magical creatures in 1926. When a Muggle accidentally lets some of his creatures loose, Newt is forced to team up with an Auror to recapture the beasts amid rising tensions in the city.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
programme.desc: Before his fifth year begins, Harry and his cousin are attacked by Dementors, forcing Harry to use magic outside of Hogwarts and therefore face the possibility of a trial and being expelled from the school. The Order of the Phoenix is founded.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
programme.desc: Harry Potter and Dumbledore embark on a dangerous journey to defeat Harry's evil enemy, Voldemort. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang probe into the identity of the mysterious Half-Blood Prince.

programme.title: Home Town: Moving to Main Street
programme.desc: A woman wants to downsize and move into town to be closer to friends and work. With her all-in budget of $125,000, she hopes to find a small home with a maintenance-free yard, a master bathroom, and space for her son.

programme.title: Home Town: Bachelor's Paradise
programme.desc: After years of travelling, a bachelor is ready to buy a home where his family has lived for five generations. Ben and Erin find a cottage with good resale potential, and their design includes a stunning master bedroom and a quaint front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: A Vacation Every Day
programme.desc: A couple is moving their family of five inland for a new job. They are looking for a large home with architectural details and space for their three kids. Their budget goes a long way as they consider a 5,000-square-foot brick beauty.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Moving Our Crazy Little Troop

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Baby on Board

programme.desc: Parsifal sails into strong winds with a baby on board as Glenn stumbles into awkward conversation with a flirtatious primary. Adam and Jenna's relationship heats up which stokes the fires between the Jenna and her interior team.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Oof! I Did It Again
programme.desc: Paget's patience runs out when he's left to pick up the slack after Parsifal crashes into the dock. A new charter of men from Long Island set sail and the crew scramble to meet their loud and incessant demands. Adam goes into beast mode while cooking.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Oooof There It Is!
programme.desc: After witnessing the guests having an out-of-control party, Captain Glenn stands his ground and sets limits on this testosterone-filled charter. Madison and Georgia are on different pages as they try to find their own ways to navigate Jenna's demands.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: No Bra, No Shoes, Bad Service
programme.desc: Adam and Jenna can't see eye-to-eye on where their relationship stands, and their epic fight on the fly bridges is a buzzkill for the rest of the crew. Ciara tries to manage Parker, but he resents her bossiness, leading the two to come to blows.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Parker's Big Adventure

programme.title: Raven's Home: What About Your Friends?
programme.desc: When Booker’s new friends try to influence him to try vaping, he turns them down, however later takes the fall when they get caught and claim that the vape pen belongs to Booker.

programme.title: Raven's Home: In-Shoe-encer

programme.title: Raven's Home: Level Up

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Crybaby Duran
programme.desc: When Gabby hears a rumour about herself going around at school, she uses a telepathic alien to find out who started it, jeopardizing the alien in the process.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have a World Record?
programme.desc: Live-action comedy following two siblings who host an online show to solve life’s issues.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Going the Green Mile
programme.desc: In an effort to save the planet, Sydney and her friends stage a student protest to convince the cafeteria to go green. Back in the '90s, Max and Leo fight to keep their school from getting rid of the junk food in the vending machines.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Yes, Lies and Tower Escape
programme.desc: After Gwen accidentally breaks a window, she and Destiny get caught in a web of lies. Noah challenges Ava to be open to more things by saying 'yes and...' to opportunities.

programme.title: Bunk'd: An Udder Disaster
programme.desc: Finn offers to care for Lou's beloved cow Bessie but must prove he can handle the responsibility. Meanwhile, Destiny and Gwen concoct a plan to patch things up between Ava and her mother.

programme.title: Jessie: The Telltale Duck
programme.desc: Jessie agrees to accompany Bertram to his high school reunion, so he can show his former classmates how successful he has become.

programme.title: Jessie: Where's Zuri?
programme.desc: Stewart gets a new manny and when he clashes with Jessie she stops the play dates between Zuri and Stewart.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Hoop Streams
programme.desc: When the school's basketball team makes it to the National Championship, Tess rallies everyone to help her host a live telethon to raise funds for the team to travel.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Slammed

programme.title: Raven's Home: Just Call Me Vic

programme.title: Raven's Home: New Dog, Old Trick
programme.desc: When Raven accompanies Nia on her retreat for the Young Leaders of Tomorrow, Raven takes advantage of the retreat to try and further her fashion career.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Twin Towers: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: New evidence recovered from the site of the World Trade Center's Twin Towers reveals answers to the greatest mysteries of these modern marvels, and using cutting-edge science and technology, experts investigate the science behind why they collapsed.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Vatican Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The Vatican is home to classified files that could reveal top-secret ties to the Nazis, the Mafia, and extraterrestrials. Using new evidence, experts investigate just what else is hiding in the Vatican's secret archives.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Unearthed: Twin Towers: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: New evidence recovered from the site of the World Trade Center's Twin Towers reveals answers to the greatest mysteries of these modern marvels, and using cutting-edge science and technology, experts investigate the science behind why they collapsed.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Vatican Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The Vatican is home to classified files that could reveal top-secret ties to the Nazis, the Mafia, and extraterrestrials. Using new evidence, experts investigate just what else is hiding in the Vatican's secret archives.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster I Married
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby, she never imagined that she would one day regret not committing murder. But years after she first discovered the horrifying truth, she is still haunted by the night when she decided not to kill him in his sleep.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: The Body in the Basement
programme.desc: While tackling the case of a missing woman, police discover a mountain of secrets and lies that leads to a grim discovery in a basement.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Murder at the House of God
programme.desc: In January 2014, Nathan and Krystal Maddox are gunned down just seconds after leaving a remote Texan church. The brutal double murder leaves a close-knit community traumatized and looking for answers.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Little Lamb
programme.desc: Investigators must identify a gunman who murdered a young mother but spared her child asleep in her car seat in the back of her minivan.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In Defiance of Evil
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a bike ride through Defiance Park. The investigation into her disappearance leads police to fear that a serial killer is on the loose in Tacoma.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Little Lamb
programme.desc: Investigators must identify a gunman who murdered a young mother but spared her child asleep in her car seat in the back of her minivan.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Terror in Waupaca
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted while playing outside her grandmother's house.

programme.title: The Body in the Basement
programme.desc: While tackling the case of a missing woman, police discover a mountain of secrets and lies that leads to a grim discovery in a basement.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: A Man and His Gun
programme.desc: Michelle has ended her relationship with alcoholic Richard and is looking forward to getting on with her life. But Richard can't let go and as his obsession grows deeper it's clear their lives will be ripped apart by the violent consequences.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Texts, Lies, and Videotape
programme.desc: Katie Call's life spirals into a terrifying nightmare as her ex, Todd, refuses to accept the collapse of their relationship. Without her knowing, he hides video cameras & microphones in her home, biding his time to wreak a bloody revenge.

programme.title: Body Cam: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Arkansas officers are pinned down by a deadly gunman for four hours. Then, in Oklahoma City, officers fear an ambush when a suspect bails from a stolen pick-up truck.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: Under Siege
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, a domestic dispute ends in tragedy when two deputies are trapped with a gun-wielding suspect; in Iowa, a high-speed pursuit escalates to a gruesome conclusion.

programme.title: Body Cam: On the Edge
programme.desc: Arkansas police stop a knife man enraged over a midnight pot roast. In Delray Beach, officers must rescue two children teetering on a ledge with their mom who's high on drugs. A trespasser in Utah attacks an officer with his own baton.

programme.title: Body Cam: Cover Me
programme.desc: Two police officers respond to a domestic disturbance that ends in tragedy. A terrifying house fire turns into a murder investigation. The search for a known sex offender builds to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Body Cam: The Chase
programme.desc: A dangerous felon has stolen a truck and will ram anything in his path; On a freezing winter night a lone officer is attacked by a crazed half naked man; At a County Jail, a gunman fires at unarmed officers, leaving one fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: In California, police face off against a knife-wielding bodybuilder. A wanted criminal draws an officer into a brawl in a sex shop and a fleeing suspect drives a car directly at officers to escape.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Doctor Will See You
programme.desc: Devoted family man Dr. David Cornbleet is brutally killed in his office. His daughter finds him, bound and gagged, in a pool of blood. Police must rely on CCTV images of man with a concealed face to lead them to David's killer in this twisted tale.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Black Hat
programme.desc: On April 14, 2009, 25-year old student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in an upmarket hotel room in Boston. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area and quickly unravel a serial attacker.

programme.title: See No Evil: Rhonda's Gone
programme.desc: On December 2nd 2014, Rhonda Daugherty vanishes. Detectives turn to the public for information on her mysterious disappearance. A tip leads investigators to surveillance footage from a hotel where they uncover a journey of duplicity and deception.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Honey Hole
programme.desc: Mark needs a lot of inventory in a hurry so he buys three cabins. It's a fast-paced triple takedown full of suspense, strategy and big crashes. The guys are still able to discover family stories that give these logs history and meaning.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Ohio Hay Barn: The Whole Story
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders save a huge hay barn in Pleasantville, Ohio, shipping it to Cave Spring, Georgia, where they rebuild it into a home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Double Pen Log Vacation Rental
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work with one of their most passionate and knowledgeable clients yet. Karen Tillary is building a vacation rental and Mark is in charge of the log addition.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Pirate Treasure Pool
programme.desc: Kelly Caviness and his team build two spectacular pools. The first is a modern, kid-friendly retreat for Mike, Lisa and their 2 children. The other pool is an epic pirate-themed water park complete with a hidden treasure room and animatronic pirates.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean and Classic in Corona
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Corona, California, to help a big extended family that's running low on living space. They design a clean, geometrical pool with an artistic fountain wall, fire features and a killer barbecue area for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Making a Splash in Arizona
programme.desc: Jeromey and Jay of Premier Pools create a personal resort for Arizona newcomers: Sally and Samer.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple seeks out the kings to help them revamp their worn-out lakeside swimming pool. The guys accept the challenge and turn the eyesore into a backyard paradise complete with a custom slide, secondary pool and more.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ozark Mountains
programme.desc: Casey travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.desc: Celebrating the best All American food that carnivals have to offer!

programme.desc: Celebrating the best carnival treats on a stick!

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eating Las Vegas
programme.desc: Noah Cappe investigates the Great American Foodie Fest in Nevada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King Crab and I
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Alaska State Fair, which is older than the state itself! He tries some local fresh seafood and state secrets, including the sasquatch sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Aporkalypse Now
programme.desc: Noah visits the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas and the Topfield Fair in Massachusetts.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: You've Got Ale

programme.desc: Matt Holguin of Fabe's Churros and Gelato has taken over the Alameda County Fair with his bacon caramel gelato milkshake.

programme.title: Carnival Kings: We All Scream For Ice Cream! And Waffles!
programme.desc: Chef Richie Farina hits the road in search of cutting-edge culinary competition, and he's found it at the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas, Nevada. He takes on Adam Terry of Waffle Love and his fluffy, ice cream-covered dulce de liege waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Kings: What's Your Queso-Dilla, Man?
programme.desc: Richie Farina hits the road to Southern California where he may have met his match at the San Bernardino County Fair. Jessica and Daniel Lopez of Orale Taco Grille created a Deep-Fried Quesadilla they call the "Queso Loco."

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The Bahamas
programme.desc: Katie goes to the most food-centric island in the Bahamas: New Providence. Conch is a staple here, so Katie can't turn down a fresh conch salad.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: The South Carolina Coast
programme.desc: A number of quaint beach towns along the South Carolina coast are leading a revolution in Lowcountry cuisine, and Katie Lee finds the best beach bites in Sullivan's Island, Mt. Pleasant, Isle of Palms and Folly Beach.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Catalina Island
programme.desc: Catalina Island offers a microcosm of California cuisine. Katie heads to Mt. Ada for a juicy lamb burger with a view.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Buon Appetito
programme.desc: Bobby fondly reminisces about his time spent in Italy as he comes up with an amazing brunch menu inspired by the flavors and food of the Italian Countryside.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bobby's recent trip to the Emerald Isle was clearly on his mind, when he came up with his succulent and savory Irish style brunch menu. Bobby creates a bountiful family style platter filled with some of Ireland's favorites.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Waffles Gone Wild
programme.desc: Ordinary waffles be warned: Chef Bobby Flay has your number! Bobby wows with a menu of unexpected waffle creations like Cornbread Waffles with Ranch Style Eggs & Cilantro Crema and Glazed Waffle Donuts!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's coffee-inspired creations include Scrambled Eggs with Sweet Potato Biscuits, Ham Steak & Red Eye Gravy, and Espresso-Chocolate Chip Banana Bread with Espresso.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
